name: agentfi-monorepo
description: AgentFi - Agent-Native OTC Trading Platform on Hedera

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix contracts && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix contracts && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.help:
echo "Available commands:
  npm run install:all - Install dependencies for all projects
  npm run dev - Start backend & frontend in development mode (port 3000 & 4000)
  npm run build:all - Build all projects
  npm run test:backend - Run backend E2E tests
  npm run deploy:contracts - Deploy smart contracts
  npm run setup - Run setup wizard
  npm run verify - Check setup status"
